web-application:
Custom web applications built for real operations

When spreadsheets and WhatsApp threads stop scaling, you need a web application your team actually uses daily — dashboards, approvals, customer portals, or internal tools tied to how you work in Zirakpur, Chandigarh, or across India.

We design around roles: who logs in, what they must see, and what should never be editable. Laravel, React, Node, or PHP stacks are chosen for maintainability, not hype.

What we typically deliver

  • Admin panels with role-based access
  • REST APIs and third-party integrations (payments, SMS, ERP)
  • Audit logs, exports, and reporting your finance team can trust
  • Staging environment + documented deployment

FAQs

How long does a custom app take? MVPs often ship in 8–14 weeks depending on integrations and compliance needs.

Do we own the code? Yes — repository access and handover are part of delivery.

Book a discovery call or use Ask price for a written estimate.
logo-design:
Logo and identity that look credible on every channel

Your logo is the fastest trust signal on a visiting card, shop board, or Instagram profile. We explore directions that fit your industry — not generic swooshes — and deliver vector files ready for print and digital.

Deliverables

  • Multiple concept directions with rationale
  • Primary, secondary, and monochrome versions
  • Social profile and favicon exports
  • Basic usage notes for your team

Need full brand kit? Pair this with graphic design services.

Start a branding brief.
gst-software:
GST billing software your accountant will actually approve

Indian GST rules change — your billing tool should keep invoices, HSN/SAC, and reports aligned without end-of-month panic. We implement or customise software for retailers, distributors, and service firms in Punjab.

Features clients ask for

  • GST invoices, credit/debit notes, and GSTR-friendly exports
  • Inventory, batch/expiry where needed
  • Multi-user counters with permissions
  • Backup and support SLAs

Already on Tally or Busy? We can discuss integration instead of rip-and-replace.

Request a demo.
exchange-listing:
Exchange listing support for blockchain projects

Listing on a reputable exchange requires technical documentation, smart contract review, and coordinated communication — not just a form submission. We help founders prepare materials and align with exchange checklists.

How we help

  • Technical documentation and website readiness review
  • Compliance checklist mapping (project-specific)
  • Coordination support with your legal and tech leads

Note: We do not guarantee listing approval — exchanges decide independently.

Discuss your project.
website-redesign:
Website redesign without losing rankings or leads

Outdated design hurts trust; reckless redesigns hurt SEO. We map existing URLs, preserve what ranks, and modernise UX, speed, and conversion paths for mobile buyers in the Tricity.

Our redesign process

  • Analytics and Search Console review before changes
  • Wireframes + staging for approval on real devices
  • 301 redirect plan and post-launch monitoring
  • Core Web Vitals and accessibility baselines

Read our guide on redesigns and SEO, then request a site audit.
desktop-application:
Desktop software for teams that work offline

Some workflows still need Windows desktop speed — billing counters, warehouse scanning, or legacy hardware integration. We build .NET or Electron apps with installers, auto-update strategy, and clear licensing if required.

Use cases

  • Internal tools syncing to a central server when online
  • Barcode/label printing and device drivers
  • Role-based access on shared office machines

Describe your workflow — we will suggest web vs desktop honestly.
bank-management:
Banking operations software for cooperatives and NBFCs

Customer onboarding, loan tracking, and branch reporting need audit trails and access control. We build modules around your approved processes — not generic templates that fight your compliance team.

Modules we have delivered

  • Customer KYC workflows and document storage
  • Loan lifecycle, EMI schedules, and collections views
  • Branch dashboards and exportable regulatory reports

Security reviews and hosting choices are scoped upfront. Speak with our solutions lead.
mall-management:
Mall and commercial space management systems

Track tenants, CAM billing, maintenance tickets, and occupancy from one admin panel. Replace scattered Excel files with reminders that actually reach facility teams.

Capabilities

  • Tenant contracts, rent schedules, and arrears
  • Maintenance requests with SLA tracking
  • Parking, vendor, and common-area charge allocation

Share your floor plan and billing rules for a tailored proposal.
medical-store-management:
Pharmacy and medical store management

Expiry dates, batch numbers, and schedule drug records cannot be “good enough.” We build billing and inventory tuned for Indian pharmacies with GST invoices and supplier purchase tracking.

Why stores switch to us

  • Batch-wise stock and near-expiry alerts
  • Fast billing keyboard shortcuts at the counter
  • Doctor/clinic credit accounts where you use them
  • Backup strategy and local support in Punjab

Book a counter-side demo.
school-management-system:
School ERP parents and staff will use

Admissions, fees, attendance, exams, and parent communication belong in one system — not five WhatsApp groups. We deploy school management software with training for office staff and simple parent views on mobile.

Modules

  • Online admission forms and document uploads
  • Fee receipts, concessions, and reminders
  • Attendance, timetables, and exam results
  • SMS/app alerts for announcements

Serving schools in Zirakpur, Mohali, and Chandigarh. Schedule a campus visit demo.
